title: DHSC annual report and accounts: 2024 to 2025
body: "The annual report and accounts gives an overview of the Department of Health and Social Care’s (DHSC’s) resources and how it has used them to fulfil its statutory functions during the financial year 2024 to 2025.  The ‘DHSC annual report and accounts: 2024 to 2025’ describes DHSC’s performance against objectives and includes the Secretary of State for Health and Social Care’s annual report on the performance of the NHS in England. The accompanying glossary defines terms used throughout the report.  ‘Financial assistance under section 40 of the National Health Service Act 2006: 2024 to 2025’ sets out how the Secretary of State has exercised their power to give financial assistance to any NHS foundation trust in the financial year 2024 to 2025.  The ‘DHSC common core tables: 2024 to 2025’ show a breakdown of departmental spending during 2024 to 2025 and demonstrate how this spending compared with DHSC’s estimate.  "
